description: Precision pesticide and fertilizer spraying for large agricultural farms. Drones cover 15-20 acres per hour compared to manual 1-2 acres per hour. Reduces chemical usage by 30% through targeted application.
Using multispectral cameras to detect crop stress, disease, and nutrient deficiency. Creates NDVI maps to guide precision farming decisions. Covers 200+ acres per flight.
High-accuracy aerial survey and mapping for construction planning, land records, and boundary verification. Produces orthomosaic maps and 3D models with centimeter-level accuracy.
Inspection of power lines, wind turbines, cell towers, bridges, and transmission infrastructure. Reduces human risk and inspection time by 80% compared to traditional methods.
Volumetric survey and stockpile measurement in mining operations. Provides accurate quantity estimates for billing. Monitors pit progression and environmental compliance.
Aerial cinematography for films, advertisements, events, and real estate showcasing. High-demand seasonal work in entertainment and wedding industries.
Aerial assessment of flood, earthquake, and cyclone affected areas. Search and rescue operations with thermal cameras. Aid delivery to inaccessible locations.
Perimeter surveillance for critical infrastructure, border areas, and ports. Night vision capable drones for 24/7 monitoring. Real-time video feed to command centers.
Last-mile delivery of medical supplies, e-commerce packages, and food in remote or traffic-congested areas. Payload capacity 2-5kg, range 10-20km per trip.
Aerial photography and videography for weddings and events. High seasonal demand October to March. Single event revenue INR 15000-25000.
